creator: lioux@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

	The patch had to be slightly modified after the MAKE_JOBS_SAFE
option was added.

	The updated patch work with Firefox 3.0.8.

	Regards,

-- 
Mario S F Ferreira - DF - Brazil - "I guess this is a signature."
